TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == satangahan : == Naluwan u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam : u canan ku Naluwan(Naluwan是什麼?)ː u niyazu' nu Sakizaya i Kuhkuh. caykayadah ku tademaw i tini. u namakay i Maibul a niyazu'. namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ː malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ː
S.PHON: == sataŋaħan : == nar~ɾuwan u zuma a kamu : nu ħur~ɾam : u ʦanan ku nar~ɾuwan(nar~ɾuwan***?)* u nijazuʔ~ʡ nu sakizaja i kuħkuħ. ʦajkajadaħ ku tadəmaw i tini. u namakaj i maibur~ɾ a nijazuʔ~ʡ. namakajniaj a nasur~ɾitan nasakamuan atu natinəŋan * mar~ɾaar~ɾitin tu i ħəkar~ɾaj atu zumaaj a natinəŋan *
S.FORM: == satangahan : == Naluwan u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam : u canan ku Naluwan(Naluwan是什麼?)ː u niyazu' nu Sakizaya i Kuhkuh. caykayadah ku tademaw i tini. u namakay i Maibul a niyazu'. namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ː malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ː
S.PHON: == sataŋaħan : == nar~ɾuwan u zuma a kamu : nu ħur~ɾam : u ʦanan ku nar~ɾuwan(nar~ɾuwan***?)* u nijazuʔ~ʡ nu sakizaja i kuħkuħ. ʦajkajadaħ ku tadəmaw i tini. u namakaj i maibur~ɾ a nijazuʔ~ʡ. namakajniaj a nasur~ɾitan nasakamuan atu natinəŋan * mar~ɾaar~ɾitin tu i ħəkar~ɾaj atu zumaaj a natinəŋan *
